infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TreasureNet needs your location to find nearby treasures and unlock clues.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TreasureNet needs background location to track your treasure hunting progress.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TreasureNet uses the camera to scan QR clues.
infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: TreasureNet uses NFC to read NFC clues.
